title: athyrium deltoidofrons var. ohmurae

It has been reported to possess medicinal properties, with the leaves being used in traditional herbal medicine, particularly in Japan, where they are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which may be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
